category_sources: Official Firefox Source Docs describe geckodriver as a proxy for W3C WebDriver-compatible clients to interact with Gecko browsers.
source_facts.description identifies geckodriver as a WebDriver Marionette proxy.
display_name_sources: Official Firefox Source Docs page title is geckodriver.
docs_sources: Official Firefox Source Docs contain geckodriver overview, usage, flags, profiles, building, testing, and release information.
repo_sources: Official GitHub mozilla/geckodriver page states source code is in mozilla-central under testing/geckodriver and GitHub is only for issues/releases.
source_facts.source-archive comes from hg.mozilla.org/mozilla-central under testing/geckodriver.
tags_sources: Official Firefox Source Docs describe W3C WebDriver interaction with Gecko-based browsers such as Firefox.
source_facts.description mentions WebDriver and Marionette proxy.
